# Hair by Syd

> Private-suite hair salon in West Omaha, Nebraska, specializing in beaded weft,
> tape-in, and K-tip hair extensions, mesh integration systems, dimensional color,
> low-maintenance blondes, and color correction.

- Salon: Hair by Syd (also listed as "Syd Hair" on Google Maps)
- Stylist: Sydney (Syd)
- Address: 10875 W Dodge Rd Ste 5, Omaha, NE 68154
- Phone: (402) 216-6197
- Booking: https://www.vagaro.com/sydhairomaha/book-now
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sydhairomaha

## Pages

- [Home](https://hairbysyd.com/): Overview, gallery, client reviews, and location
- [Hair Extensions](https://hairbysyd.com/hair-extensions/): Beaded weft, tape-in, and K-tip extensions plus mesh integration for fine or thinning hair, with FAQs
- [Hair Color](https://hairbysyd.com/hair-color/): Lived-in blondes, vivid fashion colors, and color correction, with FAQs
- [Wedding & Event Hair](https://hairbysyd.com/wedding-hair/): On-location bridal and event styling in the Omaha area, with FAQs
